elements.title: lang::report_page_030_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ra.id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       e.enrolled                                                AS enrolled,
       cc.completed                                              AS completed,
       CASE WHEN l.timespend IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE l.timespend END AS timespend,
       CASE WHEN l.visits IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE l.visits END       AS visits,
       CASE
         WHEN l.last_access IS NULL THEN kbi_mla.timeaccess
         ELSE l.last_access END                                  AS last_access
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT userid,
                         courseid,
                         SUM(kbi_t1.timespend)  AS timespend,
                         SUM(kbi_t1.visits)     AS visits,
                         MAX(kbi_t1.lastaccess) AS last_access
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_t1
                  WHERE kbi_t1.id > 0
                    AND kbi_t1.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_t1.courseid, kbi_t1.userid) l ON l.userid = kbi_u.id AND l.courseid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_mla ON kbi_mla.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_mla.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx1.instanceid, COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra1.userid) AS enrolled
                  FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra1
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx1 ON kbi_ctx1.id = kbi_ra1.contextid AND kbi_ctx1.contextlevel = 50
                  WHERE kbi_ra1.roleid = 5
                    AND kbi_ctx1.instanceid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_ctx1.instanceid) e ON e.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, COUNT(id) AS completed
                  FROM mdl_course_completions kbi_cc1
                  WHERE timecompleted > 0
                    AND kbi_cc1.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY course) cc ON cc.course = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_ra.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_ra.id, kbi_u.id, kbi_c.id, e.enrolled, cc.completed, kbi_u.firstname, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.email, kbi_c.fullname, kbi_c.shortname,
         l.timespend, l.visits, l.last_access, kbi_mla.timeaccess
